channel.title: GitHub Objective-C Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Objective-C in GitHub

item.title: opa334/TrollStore
item.description: Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple

item.title: syncthing/syncthing-macos
item.description: Official frugal and native macOS Syncthing application bundle

item.title: PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
item.description: A Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for Android and iOS based on Boardwalk. This repository contains source code for iOS/iPadOS platform.

item.title: chrismiles/CMPopTipView
item.description: Custom UIView for iOS that pops up an animated "bubble" pointing at a button or other view. Useful for popup tips.

item.title: samuelclay/NewsBlur
item.description: NewsBlur is a personal news reader that brings people together to talk about the world. A new sound of an old instrument.

item.title: joeldev/JLRoutes
item.description: URL routing library for iOS with a simple block-based API

item.title: AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-for-objc
item.description: Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) for iOS and macOS

item.title: rentzsch/jrswizzle
item.description: one-stop-shop for all your method swizzling needs

item.title: Cocoanetics/DTCoreText
item.description: Methods to allow using HTML code with CoreText
